title: Add 睡前小故事 / Bedtime Stories to writing
author: pollinations-ai[bot]

gist.headline: Sweet Dreams, Hive
gist.blurb: A new community app just landed in the greenhouse! 'Bedtime Stories' generates cozy tales to help you drift off to sleep.
gist.summary: Added the 'Bedtime Stories' app to the community showcase under the writing category.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use a new community-built tool that generates bedtime stories.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) tucked into a cozy bed or reading a bedtime storybook. The Nomnom creature sleeping peacefully nearby. Nighttime vibes, stars, cozy bedroom setting.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny nightcap, reading a glowing storybook in a snug little bed. A round tan mochi-ball creature sleeps peacefully nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and deep lavender gradient background with pixel stars. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes.
